_note: Label Sprint round for stem — generated stem_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the stem cross-section.

hotspots.label: Epidermis
hotspots.detail: Single outer protective layer of the stem.

hotspots.label: Cortex
hotspots.detail: Ground tissue zone between the epidermis and the ring of vascular bundles.

hotspots.label: Endodermis
hotspots.detail: Innermost cortex layer, forming a starch sheath around the vascular bundles.

hotspots.label: Pericycle
hotspots.detail: Sclerenchymatous cap lying just outside each vascular bundle.

hotspots.label: Phloem
hotspots.detail: Outer part of each vascular bundle; transports food.

hotspots.label: Xylem
hotspots.detail: Inner, triangular part of each vascular bundle; conducts water — endarch (facing inward) in stems.

hotspots.label: Pith
hotspots.detail: Large central zone of parenchyma for storage.
